kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! King Mouse here, your chimney sweep operations manager. I keep your scheduling tight, your customers happy, and your flues clean. Let me know what you need — inspections, cleanings, relining jobs, or cap installs — I’m on it.

quickActions.label: Schedule a chimney inspection
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a Level 1 chimney inspection for a customer this week.

quickActions.label: Create a cleaning estimate
quickActions.prompt: Draft an estimate for a standard chimney cleaning with creosote removal.

quickActions.label: Follow up on open leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me all open leads that haven't been contacted in the last 48 hours.

quickActions.label: Check today's route
quickActions.prompt: Show me today's job schedule and the most efficient route for my technicians.

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Send a review request to customers whose jobs were completed this week.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a chimney sweep business. You understand chimney inspection levels (Level 1, 2, 3), creosote buildup grades, flue relining, chimney cap installation, masonry repair, and seasonal demand spikes before winter. You help schedule technicians, generate estimates, follow up with leads, and manage customer relationships. Always be practical and safety-conscious, referencing NFPA 211 standards and CSIA certification best practices when relevant.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your trusted chimney professionals. How can I help you today?
commonReasons: Get a quote for chimney cleaning
Report a chimney fire or smoke issue
Request a Level 2 inspection for home sale

steps.title: Business details
steps.description: Enter your chimney sweep company name, address, service area, and contact information.

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Select the chimney services you provide: inspections, cleanings, relining, cap installs, masonry repair, and more.

steps.title: Your crew
steps.description: Add your certified chimney technicians and assign their specialties and availability.

steps.title: Pricing & estimates
steps.description: Set your base rates for inspections, cleanings, and common repair jobs.

steps.title: Connect your tools
steps.description: Link your Google Business Profile, payment processor, and any scheduling tools you already use.

steps.title: Go live
steps.description: Review your setup, activate your AI receptionist, and start capturing chimney service leads.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a chimney sweep business.
capabilities: Schedule and dispatch chimney inspection and cleaning jobs
Generate estimates for chimney sweeping, relining, and masonry repair
Track lead status from initial inquiry through completed job
Send automated review requests after service completion
Manage seasonal scheduling surges before heating season
Monitor technician routes and optimize daily job assignments
Provide NFPA 211 and CSIA-aligned safety recommendations
Track creosote buildup records and recommend cleaning intervals
Manage customer communication for appointment reminders and follow-ups
Analyze revenue trends and identify top-performing service categories
